user_prompt: X3 game circular avatar frame, World Cup / soccer theme, France. Use reference image 1 as the paradigm (team-color ring + flag-textured soccer ball at bottom) and reference image 2 for the skeleton/ornaments (top gold crest+gem, side gold diamond clips, bottom gold wings). KEY FIX — the RING must NOT be a flat single solid color (that looks dull and heavy). Make the ring band in royal blue team color but with RICH DETAIL: a smooth light-to-dark gradient/shading across the band, subtle metallic sheen and rim light, and a fine engraved geometric texture/pattern on the band (e.g. subtle beveled facets or carved motif) so the ring reads as an ornate detailed metal-and-enamel frame, not a plain color hoop. Keep slim gold edge trim. Bottom-center soccer ball = the FRENCH FLAG: vertical blue-white-red panels on the ball, cel-shaded glossy highlight on top, it stays the identity focus. Keep the EXACT same skeleton/layout/proportions/ornaments and clean cel-shaded X3 game-UI art style. Square 1:1, circular hollow center fully transparent for avatar, fully transparent background, NO text, NO flag cloth over frame, NO scene background, readable at 256x256.
